title: Jamaican Dumplings
description: A classic Jamaican dish made with tender dumplings, typically served with a variety of sides. These dumplings are flavorful and delicious, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
3. Add the milk and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it is smooth and elastic.
5. Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
6. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk.
7. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
8. Cook the dumplings for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown.
9. Transfer the dumplings to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the dumplings are cooked through.
11. Serve warm with your favorite sides, such as fried plantains or steamed vegetables.
